catalog.label: Product Catalog
catalog.description: Explore our comprehensive range of high-performance PVC and WPC materials engineered for structural integrity and environmental sustainability.

features.label: Technical Data Hub
features.description: Industrial performance metrics that explain why Fixoboard is the definitive substitute for traditional plywood and MDF.

termiteProof.title: Termite Proof
termiteProof.desc: Naturally resistant to biological decay and all types of pests without toxic chemical treatments.

waterProof.title: Water Proof
waterProof.desc: Guarantees zero symptoms of delamination, swelling, or water damage even if submerged.

fireResistant.title: Fire Resistant
fireResistant.desc: Self-extinguishing properties that ensure structural safety in high-risk zones like kitchens.

leadFree.title: 100% Lead Free
leadFree.desc: Zero lead content prevents damage to kidneys, liver, and nervous system. Essential for healthcare.

nonToxic.title: Non-Toxic / Zero Emission
nonToxic.desc: VOC-free boards that maintain indoor air quality. 100% recyclable and eco-friendly.

antiBacterial.title: Anti-Bacterial
antiBacterial.desc: Anti-fungal and hygienic surface that is easy to sanitize, perfect for kitchens and hospitals.

uvChemical.title: UV & Chemical Resistant
uvChemical.desc: Resistant to mild acids, alkalis, and sunlight. Ideal for both interior and exterior use.

noShrinkage.title: No Shrinkage or Swelling
noShrinkage.desc: High dimensional stability ensures boards do not warp or expand under varying weather conditions.

carpenterFriendly.title: Carpenter Friendly
carpenterFriendly.desc: Engineered for superior screw-holding. Compatible with standard woodworking tools.

leadFreeBadge.title: Lead Free Certified
leadFreeBadge.desc: Safe for healthcare & food prep areas

technicalData.label: Technical Data
technicalData.customSizesDesc: We offer custom cutting and thickness production for project-specific requirements.

finishes.label: Finishing Options
finishes.description: FixoBoard surface acts as a perfect canvas for all traditional and modern finishing techniques.

pvcWpcPly.description: A new generation eco-friendly board — highly durable with features superior to traditional plywood. Resistant to weather, moisture, fire, and termites.

wpcDoors.description: Plain WPC and CNC-designed doors that are moisture-resistant, warp-free, and termite proof. Maintenance-free aesthetic solution for modern architecture.

moistureProof.title: Moisture & Damp Proof
moistureProof.desc: Ideal for bathrooms and balconies where traditional wood doors swell or rot.

warpFree.title: Warp-Free Construction
warpFree.desc: Solid extruded composite material ensures dimensions remain stable for decades.

termiteProof.title: Termite Proof
termiteProof.desc: Naturally resistant to all biological pests without chemical coating.

designFlexibility.title: Design Flexibility
designFlexibility.desc: Easily CNC-machined for decorative patterns or surface treatments.

prelaminatePly.description: Ready-to-use boards factory-laminated in multiple shades and textures. Eliminates the need for external lamination, saving time and labor cost.

costEfficiency.title: Cost Efficiency
costEfficiency.desc: Zero labor cost for lamination and zero raw material wastage.

surfaceDurability.title: Surface Durability
surfaceDurability.desc: High-pressure factory bonding ensures no edge delamination over time.

designConsistency.title: Design Consistency
designConsistency.desc: Uniform shades and patterns across multiple sheets for large projects.

scratchResistance.title: Scratch Resistance
scratchResistance.desc: Industrial-grade top coat protects against daily wear and tear.
